query:
SELECT p.id AS property_id, p.name AS property_name, p.partner_id, 
       pt.id AS partner_id_actual, pt.name AS partner_name
FROM peppr_properties p
LEFT JOIN peppr_partners pt ON pt.id = p.partner_id
ORDER BY p.name;
